Vanity Crew

Vanity Crew

Vanity Crew is the official dance club of IIIT Pune, established with the objective of fostering creativity, expression, discipline, and community through the art of dance. The club serves as a platform for students across all experience levels to explore and develop their passion for dance while contributing to a vibrant cultural environment on campus.

The club welcomes dancers from diverse backgrounds and styles, including contemporary, hip-hop, fusion, folk, and classical dance forms such as Bharatnatyam. Vanity Crew believes in creating an inclusive environment where both experienced performers and beginners can learn, collaborate, and grow together. Through regular practice sessions, workshops, performances, and mentorship opportunities, the club encourages artistic development while strengthening confidence, teamwork, and stage presence.

Vanity Crew is recognized for bringing energy and enthusiasm to campus life through performances at college events, flash mobs, cultural showcases, and intercollegiate competitions. The club continuously strives to represent IIIT Pune with dedication, creativity, and professionalism while building a strong community united by a shared passion for dance.

Activities and Club Management

Throughout the academic year 2025–26, Vanity Crew actively organized and participated in multiple events while maintaining a structured approach toward training, skill development, and performance preparation. The club provides members with opportunities to strengthen technical abilities, creativity, teamwork, and stage presence through regular rehearsals and collaborative learning.

In addition to performances and cultural activities, Vanity Crew conducts workshops across diverse dance styles, encouraging continuous growth and artistic exploration. The club operates through student leadership and collaborative planning, fostering responsibility, discipline, and active participation among members.

Through performances, workshops, and campus engagement initiatives, Vanity Crew continues to contribute to IIIT Pune’s cultural environment while creating a space where students can develop confidence, creativity, and a lasting passion for dance.

.

 

Major Events and Performances

Club Induction: Beginning of Academic Year 2025–26

The annual Club Induction served as the formal introduction of Vanity Crew to incoming students. The event included orientation sessions, auditions, and introductory interactions aimed at familiarizing prospective members with the club’s culture, expectations, and vision. Existing members also presented performances to showcase the standards, creativity, and collaborative spirit that define Vanity Crew.


 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Flash Mob: Academic Year 2025–26

Vanity Crew organized a campus flash mob that attracted participation and engagement from students and faculty alike. The event demonstrated the club’s choreographic talent and spontaneity while creating an energetic atmosphere on campus. The flash mob also served as an effective outreach initiative by introducing a wider audience to the club’s activities and creative expression.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Republic Day Performance: 26 January 2026

As part of IIIT Pune’s Republic Day celebrations, Vanity Crew presented a patriotic dance performance reflecting themes of national pride, unity, and cultural diversity. The performance formed an important contribution to the institution’s celebration of national values and collective identity.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Shivjayanti Celebration Performance: February 2026

To commemorate the birth anniversary of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, Vanity Crew delivered a tribute performance incorporating elements of traditional folk dance alongside contemporary choreography. The performance celebrated Maharashtra’s cultural heritage while demonstrating the club’s ability to blend tradition with modern artistic interpretation.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

iConclave Performance: April 2026

Vanity Crew performed at iConclave, IIIT Pune’s intercollegiate cultural festival, representing the institute through a performance that reflected extensive preparation, coordination, and dedication. The showcase highlighted the club’s.

Vanity Crew continues to serve as a creative and collaborative space where students can pursue dance not only as an artistic discipline but also as a medium for building confidence, leadership, teamwork, and lasting connections within the IIIT Pune community.

 

Vanity Crew’s Website link: https://vanitycrew.vercel.app/
